WTI crude spiked from ~$74 in late February to $115+ in early April before crashing back to ~$92-98 on ceasefire progress -- but Q1 average realized prices were significantly higher than Q4 2025. The oilfield services sector broadly benefits from elevated energy prices as E&P operators accelerate drilling programs and increase completions activity. IBM.bottom_line: IBM enters Q1 2026 riding the strongest momentum in over a decade. FY2025 delivered $67.54B revenue (+7.6% YoY), $10.59B net income (+76% YoY), and $14.7B free cash flow -- a decade high. Management guided FY2026 to >5% constant-currency revenue growth and $15.7B FCF, above consensus expectations. The GenAI book of business stands at $12.5B cumulative (up from $9.5B QoQ), with software comprising >$2B and consulting >$10.5B. Q4 2025 was remarkable: revenue up 12% YoY (9% CC), software up 11%, infrastructure up 17% (Z17 mainframe cycle), and consulting grew modestly but with AI bookings accelerating. Consulting growth inflection: Consulting grew only ~3% in Q4. Management expects GenAI to be a consulting accelerator. Q1 will test whether the $3.6B GenAI ARR in consulting translates to revenue acceleration or whether macro headwinds are slowing enterprise spending.

Z17 mainframe cycle: Q4 infrastructure was up 17% on Z17 strength, outpacing the Z16 cycle. Q1 typically sees strong carryover from a new mainframe launch. Any deceleration below 10% would raise questions about cycle longevity.

UNH.bottom_line: UNH closed at $277.26 on April 2 (last trading day before Easter weekend). The stock is down ~16–18% YTD in 2026 and down ~47–50% over the past 12 months, marking one of the worst performances among large-cap healthcare names. The 52-week range spans approximately $234.60 – $606.36, reflecting the catastrophic multiple compression cycle that began in mid-2024 and accelerated through 2025 into 2026. At ~$277, the stock trades at roughly 15.5x forward FY2026 EPS consensus of $17.69 — well below its historical 20–25x range and near a decade-low valuation floor.

bull_case.thesis_headline: Clean quarter + maintained guide re-rates UNH.
